projectSignals.description: AI-powered salon and spa management platform for beauty and wellness professionals — appointments, clients, staff, payments, and loyalty

temperature.why: A neutral temperature balances approachability and professionalism for this audience.

saturation.why: Moderate saturation provides enough visual interest without overwhelming the content.

contrast.why: Moderate contrast balances readability with visual comfort for this audience.

accentStrategy.why: Complementary accents clearly distinguish primary actions from content for task-focused users.

personality.why: Geometric type provides clean neutrality suitable for this audience's needs.

scale.why: Spacious scale improves readability for low tech-savviness audiences.

weight.why: Regular weight provides dependable readability across content types.

hierarchy.why: Moderate hierarchy provides clear structure without overwhelming the content.

intensity.why: Subtle motion keeps task-focused users on track without distraction.

character.why: Smooth, predictable transitions avoid confusing low tech-savviness users.

purpose.why: Motion should only provide system feedback for task-driven users.

whitespace.why: Comfortable whitespace balances content visibility with breathing room.

gridDensity.why: Low tech-savviness users benefit from loose grids with clear spatial separation.

contentRatio.why: A balanced ratio mixes text and visual elements for this audience's cognitive mode.

style.why: Duotone icons balance personality with clarity for this audience.

weight.why: Regular weight icons provide dependable visibility without dominating content.

style.why: Mixed imagery provides flexibility across different content sections.

treatment.why: Full-color treatment provides the most natural, versatile visual foundation.

tone.why: Friendly copy creates approachability without undermining credibility.

verbosity.why: Concise copy balances clarity with efficiency for this audience.

entry.why: Task-focused users need immediate orientation to start their workflow.

engagement.why: Streamlined flows minimize friction for users focused on completing tasks.

conversion.why: Brief acknowledgment respects task-oriented users' time.

reasoning: +30: Calm emotional states pair with editorial-spa's serene, unhurried aesthetics
+10: Lower-stake contexts allow editorial-spa's relaxed pacing
+45: Beauty/wellness domain demands editorial-spa's serene, premium aesthetic
+25: Neutral/playful emotional states suit glass's ethereal, light aesthetic
+20: Lower density content works with glass's airy spatial treatment
+35: Glass's ethereal lightness suits beauty/wellness's aspirational visual language
+30: Task-completion mode matches construction's utility-first design approach
+25: Professional archetypes suit construction's functional, no-frills layouts
+15: Lower tech savviness needs construction's clear, obvious affordances
+10: Moderate density fits construction's structured, utilitarian layouts
+30: Professional archetypes align with industrial's utilitarian functionality
+25: Task-completion mode suits industrial's efficiency-first layout approach
+10: Moderate-to-high stakes benefit from industrial's grounded reliability
+30: Luxury's polished presentation matches beauty/wellness's premium positioning
+25: Professional archetype expects law-firm's formal, established aesthetic
+20: Task-completion mode matches terminal's command-driven interaction model
+10: Moderate density aligns with medical's balanced content presentation

narrative: This project is classified as beauty-wellness with b2b-saas-analytics characteristics. The primary user archetype is "professional" in a neutral emotional state, operating in task-completion mode. The recommended design profile is "editorial-spa", chosen to align with user psychology and domain requirements.
